title: Agent-native commerce and autonomous wallets
whyItMatters: AI agents need cheap, fast settlement for tool calls, rewards, and delegated execution.
ideas: An agent wallet policy engine that caps daily spend, allowed programs, and memo metadata for autonomous tasks.
A marketplace where agents post verifiable work receipts and receive micro-payments after deterministic checks.
A wallet simulator that replays planned agent transactions against devnet before a human grants an allowance.

title: ZK privacy and private execution
whyItMatters: High-throughput DeFi increases the need for selective disclosure, private order flow, and verifiable computation.
ideas: A privacy-preserving RFQ proof layer that lets market makers prove quote constraints without revealing inventory.
A ZK compliance receipt for wallets that proves policy checks without exposing full transaction history.
A developer dashboard that tracks privacy-related Solana repos, proof systems, and audit status.

title: DePIN compute at the edge
whyItMatters: Solana's low fees make frequent reward settlement plausible for small compute contributions.
ideas: A mobile compute contribution receipt protocol with batched Solana settlement.
A scheduler that prices AI inference tasks across DePIN compute pools using on-chain reputation.
A reputation explorer for DePIN operators that combines uptime proofs, reward history, and stake signals.

title: Trading automation for retail power users
whyItMatters: Retail traders increasingly need real-time interpretation of social, wallet, and liquidity signals.
ideas: A safety-first copy-trading rule builder that rejects thin-liquidity or high-tax token routes.
A caller-quality index that scores social accounts using historical token outcomes and wallet flow.
A portfolio sentinel that alerts when a wallet's positions become crowded across overlapping narratives.

title: Token-2022 and programmable asset primitives
whyItMatters: Token extensions move compliance, royalties, transfer logic, and metadata closer to asset infrastructure.
ideas: A Token-2022 policy linter that explains transfer hooks and extension risks before integration.
A sandbox for founders to model loyalty points, credentials, and access passes with non-transferable tokens.
A compliance-friendly asset dashboard that tracks extension configuration drift across deployments.
